text.message: Ironic that brick is short and wood is plenty
No sevens either and red is stockpiling
red want me to nit plow?
They would not do it if you gave three cards
like i said any three cards
or expect me tocounter offer within 10 secs
All due respect, I think black in best position now
Red at eight with no army comp
Good take road so we can focus on our true common enemy
pop pop pop til u drop
